resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 5% marketplace fee, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this fee is applied correctly. While the linked use case mentions a fee of $125 on a $2500 booking, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system consistently applies this fee across transactions. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to validate this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the application of the 5% marketplace fee.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
